title: Include entity summary in LLM system prompt (BuildSystemPrompt)
description:
Add nearby entity information to the LLM system prompt so the agent is aware of mobs and other entities when making decisions.

Implementation:
1. Modify `LlmChatInterpreter.BuildSystemPrompt()` in `Agent.Planning/LlmChatInterpreter.cs` to accept an `IReadOnlyList<ObservedEntity>?` parameter (or a pre-formatted summary string).
2. Add a new line to the status section:
   - `"Nearby: 2 cows, 1 zombie (5 blocks), 1 skeleton (12 blocks)"`
   - Use `NearbyEntitySummary` from WorldState.
   - Cap at 8 entities max in the prompt.
   - Sort by distance (closest first).
3. Update all callers of `BuildSystemPrompt()` to pass the entity data:
   - `HandleChatEventAsync` in `AgentBackgroundService`
   - Any test call sites
4. Add rule hints in the prompt about entities:
   - E.g., "If hostile mobs are nearby (< 10 blocks), prioritize self-preservation"

Acceptance:
- LLM prompt includes nearby entity count when entities are present.
- Empty entity list shows nothing (no "Nearby: none" clutter).
- Test fixtures updated.

Refs: `memorysmith_situational_awareness_design_doc_20260625T020914Z.md` Phase 1
